name: Week 8 KB Full Body (Explore)
description: W7 nailed the volume: B-stance flow 25lb 3x3 was ~10 min, perfect. Bent press/cossack/windmill all at 25 — depth over weight. C&P 50x8x3 breakthrough. W8: hold everything steady. 25lb for all skill/flow, 50lb for strength block only.

exercises.notes: Easy swings, wake up the hips

sets.name: Block 1: B-Stance Flow (@Asgooch)

exercises.notes: 25lb. B-stance: one foot back, heel up. W7 actuals: 3x3 was the sweet spot — ~10 min total.
-> Catch into rack on the swing. Momentum should be smooth by now.
-> Stay in B-stance, squat from rack.
-> Punch overhead from rack. Lock out hard.
-> Bell locked overhead, step into lunge. Full flow.

sets.notes: 25lb. 3 reps each side x 3 rounds. Proven volume from W7 — don't change it.

exercises.notes: 25lb. W7 actuals: 25lb felt clean. Stay here — deep stabilizers are the point, not load. Clean path, slow descent.
25lb goblet. W7 confirmed better depth at 25 than 40/45. Sit deep, heels down. Mobility exercise, not strength.
25lb. W7 felt good. Deep hip hinge, feel the stretch through hip flexors.
25lb. W7 actuals: 25lb transitions were cleaner than 30. Left side: still pause at every checkpoint. Stay at 25.
50lb. W7 breakthrough: 8 reps ALL 3 sets. Whole-body technique — hips drive clean, legs dip, shoulder pushes, arm locks out. Maintain 8x3, don't chase 10 yet.
50lb. Slow: 2s pull, 2s lower. Max KB weight — progress by tempo.
50lb. Pause at bottom 1 second. Max KB weight.
50lb. Explosive hips. 2 sets of 20, catch your breath between.

tips: Tuesday = EXPLORE. B-Stance flow at 3x3 is locked in — W7 proved the volume.
25lb for all skill/flow/mobility work. 50lb only for strength block + finisher.
Don't chase heavier weights on KB skill work. Depth and form are the gains.
C&P 8x3 at 50 was a W7 breakthrough — consolidate, don't escalate.
Finisher swings are back: 50x20 x2. Quick and done.
